set wyoming to missing for recnt years
update proportions to be *100 for plotting pursposes and for consistency to old PopHIVE_Datahub pipeline
udpates build with some additional JSOn meta data
fix epic week dates to be saturday instead of sunday
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
fix respiratory bundle structure to remove subfolders

message: flu data from delphi added to bundle
fix suppressions flags for all epic files in bundle
update proportions to be *100 for plotting pursposes and for consistency to old PopHIVE_Datahub pipeline
replace N with pct for Epic
filter older NHSN data that is not reliable according to Delphi source
filter time to last 2 years and geographies
fix smoothing so it is applied to NHSN
udpates build with some additional JSOn meta data
fix epic week dates to be saturday instead of sunday
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
run the build on full pipeline
fix respiratory bundle structure to remove subfolders

replace N with pct for Epic
filter older NHSN data that is not reliable according to Delphi source
filter time to last 2 years and geographies
fix smoothing so it is applied to NHSN
udpates build with some additional JSOn meta data
fix epic week dates to be saturday instead of sunday
mostly updated data. Some epic endpoints failing on virus pipeline
run the build on full pipeline
fix respiratory bundle structure to remove subfolders
